title: Daikin India International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Daikin India International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Daikin India International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Howrah. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Daikin India International Enterprises:
Daikin India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Daikin India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
